items.title: US charges Mexican governor and other leaders with aiding drug cartel
items.dek: The governor of Sinaloa, Rúben Rocha Moya, hails from the same party as the president of Mexico.

items.title: Bondi shooting inquiry calls for gun reform and more security at Jewish festivals
items.dek: An interim report says country should prioritise 'nationally consistent' firearms reforms.
